vocab.example: Standing at the edge of the Grand Canyon was one of the most awe-inspiring moments of my life.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che khuất
vocab.example: From the penthouse, we had an uninterrupted view of the city’s glowing metropolis at night.
The Maldives is renowned for its crystalline waters, where you can see the vibrant coral reefs from above.
The old town of Prague has a captivating charm, especially when the cobblestone streets are dusted with snow.

vocab.meaning: vẻ rạng rỡ, huy hoàng của tự nhiên
vocab.example: Iceland is a land of immense natural splendor, boasting everything from glaciers to black sand beaches.

vocab.meaning: phông nền đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: The snow-capped Alps provided a picturesque backdrop for the small village nestled in the valley.

vocab.meaning: độc đáo, cổ kính và thu hút
vocab.example: We spent the afternoon exploring quaint seaside hamlets along the coast of Cornwall.

vocab.meaning: hùng vĩ, siêu thực, tuyệt mỹ
vocab.example: There is something truly sublime about watching the Northern Lights dance across a pitch-black sky.
The Great Wall of China is a colossal man-made wonder that snakes across the mountain ridges.

vocab.meaning: môi trường sạch sẽ, ban sơ
vocab.example: Eco-tourists flock to the Galapagos Islands to witness rare wildlife in a pristine environment.
